description: Maximum number of final inbox items the brain dump processor should return.
Preferred task splitting style. Suggested values: situation_aware, tiny_steps, balanced, coarse.
Priority used when AI output is unavailable or does not include a valid priority.
Number of days before archived items are permanently deleted.
Default calendar week start for new users and guest sessions. Suggested values: monday, sunday.
Operational timezone reference for date-oriented text and docs.
Preferred filename prefix for Markdown exports.

defaultValue: 계정 생성 후 인증 메일을 확인해야 로그인이 가능합니다. 메일함과 스팸함을 확인해주세요.
description: Copy used to remind users that sign up requires email confirmation.
